problem id: 8d2290b0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  00110100 -> 01101011
  00001001 -> 00010010
  01110011 -> 11100001
  10011010 -> 00111101
  01100011 -> 11000000
  11101010 -> 11011010
  11010110 -> 10100001
  01001000 -> 10010100

query: 11000110
predicted answer: 10000000
